steps.t: Meneldir stands on the road that runs into Minhiriath, contemplating Boromir's decision.
Meneldir will meet you back at the east gate of Herne, where the two of you will continue your journey to find his friend Narndir.
Meneldir agreed to meet up with you at the north gate of Herne, where the two of you will continue your journey to find his friend Narndir.
